description: M55 baseline + M56 actual token totals for SC4 retroactive closure

m55Baseline.note: Trailing-3 milestones M50/M52/M54 did not capture comparable token totals; M55 was the first measurable verify-gate run. Per-task token totals were sparse — M56 first execute+verify cycle produces the comparable measurement.

m56Actual.source: M56 D1+D2+D3+D4+D5 ship measured in-session via npm test (no claude -p subagent spawns during execute since we ran serially); per-task token totals not collected because workers ran in main session, not detached
m56Actual.note: M55 SC4 retroactive closure: the captureSpawn invariant introduced in M55 means M56+ token deltas WILL be measurable when execute runs detached (parallel-headless via runDispatch). M56 itself was executed serially in-session per user directive, so the token-delta comparison is forward-looking — first parallel-fan-out execute milestone after M56 will produce the comparable measurement.

deltaNote: See m56Actual.note — closure deferred to next parallel-fan-out execute milestone
